hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '_variables.scss'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not modify _variables.scss directly — use design tokens' >&2; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.component\.ts$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use feature-name.ts not feature-name.component.ts per project conventions' >&2; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '(app\.routes|organization\.service)\.ts$'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"⚠️ Editing architectural file: $f — review changes carefully\"}"; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && export PATH="/Users/shivsoni/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/bin:$PATH" && npx prettier --write "$f" --ignore-unknown 2>/dev/null || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.scss$' && ! echo "$f" | grep -q '_variables'; then matches=$(grep -Pn '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}\b' "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^\s*//' || true); if [ -n "$matches" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Hardcoded hex colors found in $f — use \$color-* design tokens instead" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.spec\.ts$'; then count=$(grep -c '\bit(' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$count" -lt 10 ]; then echo "WARNING: Only $count tests in $f (minimum 10 required)" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.service\.ts$' && ! echo "$f" | grep -q '\.spec\.'; then missing=''; for org in org-1 org-2 org-3; do if ! grep -q "$org" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then missing="$missing $org"; fi; done; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then echo "WARNING: $f is missing data for:$missing" >&2; fi; fi; }
